Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril hosts culinary students from his alma mater, Johnson & Wales University.
Video.title: Gumbo 101

Video.summary: Emeril hosts a group of "recipe rut" moms.
Video.title: Vinaigrettes Aren't Just for Salads

Video.summary: Emeril prepares coffee-infused recipes.
Video.title: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Image.alt: Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes
Coffee: Sneaky Flavor Enhancer in Savory Dishes

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Scott Maurer compose an entire meal around Louisiana oysters.
Video.title: with Scott Maurer

Video.summary: Emeril offers some delicious meatless entrees: udon noodle stir-fry with crunchy vegetables, hearty kale and chickpea stew, and eggplant and squash lasagna
Video.title: Vegetarian Main Courses

Video.summary: For your next get together, host a dinner the New Orleans way!
Video.title: Crawfish Celebration

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack: sea beans!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Subtley sweet, Emeril makes the most of figs: Goat Cheese Tart with Prosciutto and Port-Macerated Figs; Seared Duck Breasts with Spiced Fig Jam; Bucatini with Figs and Gorgonzola Sauce.
Video.title: Fig Envy

Video.summary: For your next get together, make Louisiana bourbon the star ingredient.
Video.title: Louisiana Bourbon

Video.summary: For your next get together, try Emeril's favorite beef recipes with an international twist!
Video.title: Why Grass-Fed Beef?

Video.summary: Inspired by saffron grown right here in the states, Emeril serves up his famous lobster with pappardelle and saffron cream sauce, seafood paella, and saffron olive oil cake.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: For your next tailgate, let Los Angeles' Asian flavors inspire you.
Video.title: Los Angeles Chargers

Video.summary: Detroit Lions superfan Michael Banks and his wife, Rona, enjoy Tailgating fare.
Video.title: Detroit

Video.summary: Embrace autumn with Emeril's sweet and savory apple recipes.
Video.title: Amazing Apples

Video.summary: Emeril and Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter prepare classic down-home dishes.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: For a New York style tailgate, keep it old school with Emeril's favorite deli inspired classics.
Video.title: New York Giants

Video.summary: For your next get together, bring a touch of New Orleans with some andouille sausage.
Video.title: Andouille Sausage 101

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare brunch dishes.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril and Justin Kennedy prepare a menu with classic New Orleans sandwiches.
Video.title: with Justin Kennedy

Video.summary: The best strawberries come from Louisiana, and here are some of Emeril's favorite berry recipes.
Video.title: Strawberry Festival

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: For your next get together, celebrate the creole tomato with some of Emeril's favorite dishes.
Video.title: What's a Creole Tomato?

Video.summary: When the delivery truck gets a flat, Emeril cooks up what's available from the Chelsea Market. You don't want to miss what he's got up his sleeve
Video.title: Emeril's Kitchen Surprise

Video.summary: Caribbean-Style Oxtails; Arroz Con Pollo; One Pan Cheesy Grits with Eggs and Bacon; Applesauce Glazed Pork Loin with Parsnips and Turnips; Asian Seafood Chowder
Video.title: One Pot Dishes

Video.summary: Lump Crab Meat Beggar's Purses, Belon Oysters with Champagne Mignonette, Lobster Mousse Bouchees, Baby Lamb Chops, Dijonnaise Potato Squares, Chocolate Truffles
Video.title: V is for Valentine

Video.summary: Herbed Pan Roast of Salmon with Warm Greens and Herb Vinaigrette; Focaccia with Savory and Olives; Tarragon Chicken Salad; Cilantro-Avocado Potato Salad; Mint Julep Sorbet
Video.title: Emeril's Herb Garden

Video.summary: Emeril shares his mom's best recipes Salt Cod Fritters; Kicked-Up Breaded Pork Chops; Roasted Garlic Mashed Potatoes; Smothered Green Peas
Video.title: Miss Hilda's Secret Recipes

Video.summary: Pan-Roasted Chicken Breasts with Chasseur Sauce; Glazed Carrots; Pommes Anna
Video.title: French Classics

Video.summary: Herb-Tossed White Asparagus, Fresh Crabmeat and Grilled Radicchio Salad, Herb-Crusted Salmon with Asparagus Beurre Blanc, Chicken Confit and Asparagus with Pasta "Rags"
Video.title: Asparagus

Video.summary: Chef Emeril will create a menu that's light, healthy, and extremely satisfying: Turkey Roulade with Spinach and Mushrooms; Angel Food Cake with Fresh Berries and Strawberry Sauce
Video.title: Light Dining

Video.summary: Goat Cheese and Vegetable Ravioli in Citrus-Tomato Broth with Fresh Herbs and Melted Leeks; Crispy Crabmeat Ravioli with Sweet Corn Maque Choux
Video.title: Ravioli

Video.summary: Classically Seasoned Confit, Rilly Rillette, Pasta with Confit
Video.title: Confit

Video.summary: Poached Sweetbreads with Mushroom Sauce, Calves Liver with Balsamic Apples and Pears
Video.title: Other Parts

Video.summary: Smoked Sturgeon Napoleon with Caviar Cream; Baked Louisiana Blue Crab Imperial with Caviar and Sauteed Pea Shoots
Video.title: Caviar

Video.summary: Lobster Gazpacho, Fruit Minestrone
Video.title: Cold Soup

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos take inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo
